title: (Bearish Signal) EQT, Stochastic Oscillator left the overbought zone on June 08, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that EQT's price trend could be reversing, and it may be an opportunity to sell the stock or take a defensive position. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 62 similar cases where EQT's stochastic oscillator exited the overbought zone, and 52 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 84%. Current price $22.70 crossed the resistance line at $21.85 and is trading between $23.10 resistance and $21.85 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 05/06/21 - 06/08/21, the price experienced a +22% Uptrend. During the week of 06/01/21 - 06/08/21, the stock enjoyed a +3% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/mw65dy5ic9471.png?width=1525&format=png&auto=webp&s=3288f3414007df93425f616b3f8bd5b9a571d647

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for EQT moved out of overbought territory on May 18, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 16 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. In 12 of the 16 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 75%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for EQT turned negative on May 25, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 46 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. In 30 of the 46 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 65%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where EQT declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 77%.

EQT broke above its upper Bollinger Band on May 17, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/11678364-eqt-eqt-22-5-stochastic-oscillator-left-the-overbought-zone-on-june-08-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
